converted from EAD 1.0 to EAD 2002 >>>>>>> 2e3ec5c57314077b8435567632a49d313357daab
English
Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections
Johnson Graduate School of Management. Student Activities Office records
Johnson Graduate School of Management (Cornell University). Student Activities Office
26-8-3199
2 cubic feet.
4 videocassettes.
1992-1999. Records, resumes, reports, memoranda, job descriptions and applications, articles, correspondence, notes, calendars, brochures, slides, videocassettes. Student files, correspondence and videos for the Masters in Business Administration (MBA) Program. Collection material in English 4236792
General
Contact Information:
Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections 2B Carl A. Kroch Library Cornell University Ithaca, NY 14853 (607) 255-3530 Fax: (607) 255-9524 rareref@cornell.edu http://rmc.library.cornell.edu
Date completed:
April 2002
EAD encoding:
J.M. Nicholas, July 2003
Date modified:
RMC Staff, February 2014
COLLECTION DESCRIPTION
Student files, correspondence and videos for the Masters in Business Administration Program, including information on those who participated in the Russian and Japanese exchange and graduate fellowship programs.
SERIES LIST
Series I. Russian Exchange Program
Box 1, folders 1-18
Series II. Japanese Business Program
Box 1, Folders 19-42
Series III. Edmund S. Muskie and Freedom Support Act Graduate Fellowship Program
Box 1, Folders 43-50
Series IV. Central and Eastern Europe Development Program
Box 1, Folders 51-61; Box 2, Folders 1-17
Series V. MBA Enterprise Corps
Box 2, Folders 18-36
Cite As:
Johnson Graduate School of Management Student Activities Office records, #26-8-3199. Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections, Cornell University Library.
Videotapes. Educational exchanges -- Russia. Educational exchanges -- Japan. Student exchange programs -- Russia. Student exchange programs -- Japan. Student exchange programs -- New York (State) -- Ithaca. Student activities -- New York (State) -- Ithaca. Cornell University -- : Graduate students. Johnson Graduate School of Management (Cornell University) -- : Students.
